ActivateServiceToAllow: Activate this service to allow paid backups using your wallet balance
AddCreditsToEnableAI: Adding credits will automatically enable {{organizationName}} AI and make models available to all users. Continue?
AIAgentsDescription: Set up a personalized assistant for your team by adding a knowledge base, selecting the ideal model, and connecting an {{mcpServer}}.
AIGetStartedStep1Description: Transfer credits from your {{productName}} wallet to {{organizationName}} AI. If your wallet is empty, top it up first. Credits never expire.
AIGetStartedStep1Title: Add funds to your AI balance
AIGetStartedStep2Description: Once you add credits, all AI features become available instantly. No additional setup required.
AIGetStartedStep3Description: Each AI request automatically deducts credits based on the feature and model in use, ensuring charges align with actual usage.
AIGetStartedStep3Title: Pay only for what you use
AIModelsIntro: Pick the right model for your task — from budget-friendly to advanced. <1>OpenRouter pricing</1> shown. A 20% service fee applies to usage.
AIPricingAdditionalTooltipVectorization: <1>Vectorization</1> — Documents are processed and indexed when you upload them to Knowledge Base in AI agents.
AIPricingAdditionalTooltipWebCrawling: <1>Web crawling</1> — AI visits and extracts content from specific web pages to analyze or use in your request.
AIPricingAdditionalTooltipWebSearch: <1>Web search</1> — AI fetches real-time information from the web when needed for your request.
AIPricingFeeNoteUsage: * <1>OpenRouter pricing</1> + 20% service fee applies at usage
AIPricingIntro: AI features are pay-as-you-go. Credits are deducted from your balance based on actual usage.
AIPricingTokensTooltipInput: <1>Input tokens</1> — Text and data you send to AI models
AIToolsDescription: Enabling {{organizationName}} AI will make {{organizationName}}-provided AI models available to all {{productName}} users.
ChatBotDescription: Interact with an AI assistant directly in your editors — ask questions, get suggestions, or speed up your workflow.
ConnectService: Connect the service <1>here</1> to enable backup features
ContactToPayer: Contact the Payer (<1>{{email}}</1>) to connect the backup service.
CreditsFromWalletDescription: Add credits from your wallet to {{organizationName}} AI to start using features. AI expenses are handled through a sub-account, ensuring a spending limit and protecting your wallet balance.
DisableAIToolsConfirm: Disabling {{organizationName}} AI will make {{organizationName}}-provided models unavailable.
DisableAIToolsConfirmBalance: Your balance: <1>{{balance}}</1> will remain in your account.
DisableAIToolsConfirmReEnable: You can re-enable the service at any time. Are you sure you want to continue?
DisableBackupConfirm: Disabling the Backup service will prevent {{productName}} administrators from creating backups. If Auto Backup is enabled, it will remain active within the free quota, but once the quota is fully utilized, it will be permanently deactivated. Are you sure you want to continue?
DisableBackupConfirmWithoutQuota: Disabling the Backup service will prevent {{productName}} administrators from creating backups. If Auto Backup is enabled, it will be deactivated. Are you sure you want to continue?
EnableAIDescription: AI usage is billed from your prepaid balance. If the balance is too low, AI requests will not be processed.
EnableBackupConfirm: Enabling the Backup service will allow all {{productName}} administrators to create backups anytime, as long as the wallet balance is sufficient. Are you sure you want to continue?
ErrorCheckingDescription: Correct typos and grammar mistakes to enhance text quality.
FreeBackupsRenewsDate: Free backups are used first. Will be automatically renewed <1>on {{date}}</1>
ImageGenerationDescription: Design original images and illustrations using AI for your documents.
InsufficientPermissionsMessage: You don't have sufficient permissions. Please contact the payer (<1>{{payerContact}}</1>) to access and configure the services.
LowBalance: Low credit balance. Add credits to ensure uninterrupted service.
NeedTopUpWallet: Your wallet has insufficient funds. Please top up your wallet.
NextMonthBillDate: Your next monthly bill will be {{currency}} starting from {{date}}
OCRDescription: Recognize and extract text from scanned PDFs and images.
SummarizationDescription: Quickly generate summaries of documents to save time and focus on key points.
TextGenerationDescription: Create unique content like articles, letters, or marketing materials in minutes, right within the editor.
TextTranslationDescription: Translate text into your desired language instantly, while maintaining meaning and context.
ThirdPartyResourceDescription: Connect and save backups to cloud accounts like Dropbox, Box, OneDrive, or Google Drive.
ThirdPartyStorageDescription: Use third-party services to store your backups. Ideal for connecting external cloud storage platforms.
